CheckBeforeAddCacheNodes.type: Cache access type to be added by the user in MasterManaged deployment mode. Currently supported values: * BCC: Baidu Cloud Compute (BCC); * IDC: Self-built data center
CheckBeforeAddCacheNodes.cacheNodes: List of node information to be added. See appendix AddCacheNodeInfo
CheckBeforeAddCacheNodes.cacheNodes.config: Node configuration info, JSON format string, default config: {  "systemConfig": {    "vm.max_map_count": 524288,    "fs.aio-max-nr": 10485760  },  "resourceConfig": {    "requestCpu": 4,    "limitCpu": 16,    "requestMem": "2GiB",    "limitMem": "8GiB"  },  "serviceConfig": {    "min_log_level": 1  }}
CheckBeforeAddCacheNodes.cacheNodes.diskInfos: Disk information for joining nodes, see appendix DiskInfo. The field `format` is required, indicating whether to format the disk before joining. Enum values: * true: must provide the dev device to be formatted; `dev` and `mountPath` are required; * false: must provide the `diskQuotaGiB` capacity for the specified path; `mountPath` and `diskQuotaGiB` are required
CheckBeforeAddCacheNodes.cacheNodes.deployPath: Service deployment path for the cache node. Default: /home/.rapidfs/
CheckBeforeAddCacheNodes.cacheNodes.bccInfo: BCC cache node info, required when cache node type is BCC, see appendix BCCCacheNodeInfo. Field `bccId` is required
CheckBeforeAddCacheNodes.cacheNodes.idcInfo: IDC cache node info, required when cache node type is IDC, see appendix IDCCacheNodeInfo. Fields `sshUser`, `sshPassword`, and `sshPort` are required
